description: We Believe in Israel is a British advocacy organization that campaigns for Israel within the UK political landscape. It engages with parliamentary lobbying, grassroots mobilization, and public communications to counter hostile narratives about Israel in British media and politics. The organization has been led by analysts with backgrounds in Middle Eastern affairs.
editorial_notes: UK-based pro-Israel advocacy group. Catherine Perez-Shakdam became its director following her public disclosure of her Jewish identity and pivot away from pro-Iran commentary in 2021-2022.
